prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年物理类最低位次约43263→39596→45449→40667→46560，整体呈波动上升趋势，近3年累计后移约7000名；2025年基准约46560名，为近年最高位次。
2 .【招生计划】本省物理类计划2021–2022年均为33人，2023年增至35人，2024年缩减至25人，2025年回升至32人；2026年计划33人，较2025年小幅扩招约3.1%，扩招使竞争 略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第189–195名，属中后段211，排名近年略有下滑；抖音热度排名第30、评价"较热 "，短视频曝光量在211高校中处于中等偏上水平，反映报考关注度有所升温；声誉文件中未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录，整体声誉平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以计算机、临床医学、师范类为主，计算机类社会热度偏热但近年有所 降温，临床医学持续高热推荐；本省2026年普通高考总人数约20.9万，按近年物理类占比约65.5%估算约13.7万人，较2025年物理类13.95万人略减；西藏大学位于西藏拉萨，距重庆较远，地域偏好对重庆考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次46560、2026年计划小幅扩招约3.1%（按供需弹性使位次数字增大）、抖音热度升温吸引更多关注，以及本省物理类考生总数略减 等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧但幅度有限；预测最低位次约47333名，区间46833–47833名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated: 43263 → 39596 → 45449 → 40667 → 46560, showing an overall upward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7000 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 46560, the highest ranking in recent years.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The local Physics Category enrollment plan was 33 in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 35 in 2023, reduced to 25 in 2024, and rebounded to 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 33, a slight expansion of about 3.1% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the main ranking of Soft Science has been around 189–195 in recent years, placing it in the middle-to-lower tier of 211 universities, with a slight decline in ranking; Douyin popularity ranking is 30th, rated as 'relatively hot', with short video exposure at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, reflecting increased attention from applicants; no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps were found in reputation documents, overall reputation is stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Teacher Training; Computer Science is socially popular but has cooled slightly in recent years, while Clinical Medicine remains highly recommended; the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in the province for 2026 is about 209,000, with an estimated 137,000 in Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 65.5%, slightly down from 139,500 in 2025; Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, far from Chongqing, and regional preference has a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Chongqing candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 46560, a slight expansion of about 3.1% in the 2026 plan (which, according to supply-demand elasticity, increases the ranking number), increased attention from Douyin popularity, and a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in the province, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025 but to a limited extent; the predicted minimum ranking is about 47333, with a range of 46833–47833.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 46833–47833, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choices, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 46800), you can focus on applying for popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 47800), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors to avoid slipping.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 12288 → 9382 → 11313 → 6962 → 6928. In recent years, the ranking has moved forward overall (ranking number decreases, easier to enter). In 2024, it jumped significantly to 6962, and in 2025 it remained roughly stable at 6928. The baseline for 2025 is about 6928. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 17 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 14, a reduction of about 6.7% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been around 189–195 in recent years, placing it in the middle-to-lower segment of 211 universities, with a slight decline in recent years. On Douyin, it ranks 30th in popularity with a 'relatively hot' evaluation, and its short video exposure is at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, reflecting increased attention from applicants. The reputation file shows no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps, indicating overall stable reputation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category majors include Law, Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, and Teacher Training. Law is socially popular but highly competitive, Accounting offers stable employment, Chinese Language and Literature is highly recommended, and Teacher Training is divided with some waiting. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 209,000, with History Category accounting for approximately 34.5%, estimated at 72,000, slightly down from 73,400 in 2025. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, far from Chongqing, and geographical preferences may somewhat suppress the willingness of Chongqing candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6928, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 6.7% (which, according to supply-demand elasticity, reduces the ranking number), the increased attention from Douyin popularity, and the slight decrease in the total number of History Category candidates in the province, competition in 2026 is expected to ease slightly compared to 2025, but the extent is limited. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6701, with a range of 6201–7201.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 6200), you can focus on popular majors like Economics and English Teacher Training.
